impact: Creates a deterministic PP&D handoff artifact tying normalized public documents, extracted requirements, source evidence, and formal guardrail bundle IDs together without network access, raw processor output, or private DevHub artifacts.
summary: Add fixture-only processor-to-formal-logic handoff manifest validation.
target_task: Task checkbox-109: Task checkbox-104: Add a fixture-only processor-to-formal-logic handoff manifest that links normalized PP&D documents, extracted requirements, source evidence, and guardrail bundle IDs without invoking network, raw processor output, or private DevHub artifacts.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
